_comment: Scenario engine output for CASE-001 — written at scenario_selected step, read by approval handler to populate DecisionRecord.recommendation_shown. This file is the answer to Sprint 6 Day 1 Investigation 1: recommendation_shown must be persisted between scenario selection and approval. DO NOT delete this file until decision-record.json is written.

ranked_scenarios.label: Expedite shipment from Rotterdam
ranked_scenarios.reason: Higher logistics cost but avoids 11 days of production downtime. Arrives before stockout date of 2026-06-14.

ranked_scenarios.label: Order from replacement supplier (NordSteel DE backup)
ranked_scenarios.reason: More expensive than expediting but eliminates dependency on delayed shipment entirely.

ranked_scenarios.label: Wait for original shipment
ranked_scenarios.reason: Inventory covers only 3 days while predicted delay is 14 days. Production stops for 11 days at 150,000 EUR/day. Customer commitment missed by 10 days.

_lifecycle: Written by: POST /api/cases/:id/select-scenario. Read by: POST /api/cases/:id/approve. Deleted or marked stale after: decision-record.json is written.
